member.name: M:TaskManagement.API.Controllers.AuthController.Login(TaskManagement.Application.DTOs.LoginRequest)
member.summary: Authenticates a user and returns JWT tokens.

member.name: M:TaskManagement.API.Controllers.AuthController.RefreshToken(TaskManagement.Application.DTOs.RefreshTokenRequest)
member.summary: Refreshes the access token using a valid refresh token.

member.name: M:TaskManagement.API.Controllers.TasksController.Create(TaskManagement.Application.DTOs.CreateTaskRequest)
member.summary: Creates a new task for the authenticated user.
member.remarks: Business rules: - Duplicate task titles are rejected for the same user on the same day. - Task is queued for background processing automatically.

member.name: M:TaskManagement.API.Controllers.TasksController.GetById(System.Guid)
member.summary: Returns a specific task by ID. Results are cached in Redis for 5 minutes.

member.name: M:TaskManagement.API.Controllers.TasksController.GetAll
member.summary: Returns all tasks belonging to the authenticated user, sorted by priority then date.

member.name: M:TaskManagement.API.Controllers.TasksController.UpdateStatus(System.Guid,TaskManagement.Application.DTOs.UpdateTaskStatusRequest)
member.summary: Updates the status of a task. Invalidates the Redis cache entry.

member.name: M:TaskManagement.API.Controllers.UsersController.GetMe
member.summary: Returns the currently authenticated user's profile.

member.name: M:TaskManagement.API.Controllers.UsersController.Create(TaskManagement.Application.DTOs.CreateUserRequest)
member.summary: [Admin] Creates a new user (can set role).
